decision_reasons: Core assets are present and usable: question text, one primary image, and a numeric answer all exist, so the sample is not missing essential semantics.
The problem is strongly image-dependent, but the required diagram image is available and registry_passed=true, so it remains recoverable.

Asset metadata has provenance gaps (empty metadata.image_paths and original image recorded as a PIL.Image representation), which lowers confidence even though the extracted image file exists.
Given the high-recall collection rule, these issues justify deprioritization rather than rejection.
